name: Texas Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the beef in beer for at least 8 hours.
2. Drain the beef; pat dry on paper towels.
3. Brown the beef in hot oil in a large kettle.
4. Add green pepper, onion, tomatoes, tomato sauce, and beans to the kettle.
5. Cook on medium heat for 1 hour.
6. Add spices (chili powder, ground cumin, salt, garlic salt, dried oregano), jalapeno peppers, and hot pepper sauce.
7. Cook for an additional 2 hours.
Yields: 4 quarts
